title: Shri Gayatri Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Gayatri Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Gayatri.
description:
Jayati Jai Gayatri Mata,
Jayati Jai Gayatri,
Sat marg par humein chalao,
Jo hai sukhdata॥
॥ Jayati Jai Gayatri Mata ॥

Adi shakti tum alakh niranjan,
Jag palan kartri,
Duhkh, shok, bhay, klesh, kalah,
Daridrya dainya hartri॥
॥ Jayati Jai Gayatri Mata ॥

Brahma rupini, pranat palini,
Jagatdhatri Ambe,
Bhavbhayhari, janhitkari,
Sukhda Jagadambe॥
॥ Jayati Jai Gayatri Mata ॥

Bhayaharini bhavtarini anaghe,
Aj anand rashi,
Avikari, aghahari, avichalit,
Amale avinashi॥
॥ Jayati Jai Gayatri Mata ॥

Kamdhenu sat chit ananda,
Jai Ganga Gita,
Savita ki shashvati shakti tum,
Savitri Sita॥
॥ Jayati Jai Gayatri Mata ॥

Rig, Yaju, Sam, Atharva, pranayini,
Pranav mahamahime,
Kundalini sahastrar sushumna,
Shobha gun garime॥
॥ Jayati Jai Gayatri Mata ॥

Swaha, Swadha, Shachi, Brahmani,
Radha, Rudrani jai Satarupa,
Vani, Vidya, Kamala, Kalyani॥
॥ Jayati Jai Gayatri Mata ॥

Janani hum hai, deen heen,
Duhkh daridra ke ghere,
Yadapi kutil, kapati kapoot,
Tau balak hai tere॥
॥ Jayati Jai Gayatri Mata ॥

Snehasani karunamayi mata,
Charan sharan deejai,
Bilakh rahe hum shishu sut tere,
Daya drishti keejai॥
॥ Jayati Jai Gayatri Mata ॥

Kaam, krodh, mad, lobh, dambh,
Durbhav, dwesh hariye,
Shuddh buddhi, nishpaap hriday,
Man ko pavitra kariye॥
॥ Jayati Jai Gayatri Mata ॥

Tum samarth sab bhanti tarini,
Tushti, pushti trata,
Sat marg par humein chalao,
Jo hai sukhdata॥
॥ Jayati Jai Gayatri Mata ॥

Jayati Jai Gayatri Mata,
Jayati Jai Gayatri Mata,
Sat marg par humein chalao,
Jo hai sukhdata॥
॥ Jayati Jai Gayatri Mata ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Gayatri Mata's Aarti?
faq.a1: It is performed to attain wisdom, knowledge, and spiritual enlightenment.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for worshipping Gayatri Mata?
faq.a2: Gayatri Jayanti and Sundays are considered particularly auspicious.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for Mother Gayatri?
faq.a3: Mishri (sugar candy), fruits, and sattvic food are preferred.
faq.q4: Can Gayatri Mata's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, performing her Aarti at home with a pure heart is highly beneficial.
faq.q5: What should be done after the Aarti for peace of mind?
faq.a5: Chanting the 'Gayatri Mantra' after the Aarti is the best practice.
